page_metadata.biotools__summary: Skyline Batch is an application that automates a common Skyline workflow for batch processing Skyline documents. It interacts with Skyline through the command-line, allowing it to import data into a template document, export reports, and run R scripts on those reports without bringing up the Skyline user interface.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Skyline Batch is an application that automates a common Skyline workflow for batch processing Skyline documents. It interacts with Skyline through the command-line, allowing it to import data into a template document, export reports, and run R scripts on those reports without bringing up the Skyline user interface.
